docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-10-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT IS PRESENT BENJAMIN TURMAN DBA MAN AND A VAN HANDYMAN IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BENJAMIN TURMAN, OWNER. DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT IS PRESENT KATE CONNALLY. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $500 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY 10, 2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES BOTH THE CLAIMS IN THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.00) SERVED APR-24-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TURMAN, BENJAMIN DBA MAN AND A VAN HANDYMAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,328.67 FILED BY TURMAN, BENJAMIN DBA MAN AND A VAN HANDYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT CONNALLY, KATE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TURMAN, BENJAMIN DBA MAN AND A VAN HANDYMAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, WHICH INCLUDES BOTH THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND THE DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY CONNALLY, KATE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT TURMAN, BENJAMIN DBA MAN AND A VAN HANDYMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, WHICH INCLUDES BOTH THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND THE DEFENDANT'S CROSS CLAIM PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $240. SERVED APR-09-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CONNALLY, KATE
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY TURMAN, BENJAMIN DBA MAN AND A VAN HANDYMAN CONNALLY, KATE
